channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Comanchero bikie gang reacts to ACT's proposed ban on gang colours
item.description: A massive police operation took over a quiet street in north Canberra on Saturday morning, as police officers inspected almost 40 vehicles and tested nearly 80 members of the Comanchero outlaw motorcy...

item.title: South Africa’s Bill of Rights at 30: Measuring Progress in Achieving Human Dignity
item.description: Thirty years after the adoption of South Africa’s Bill of Rights, the country finds itself reflecting on a hard question: have the constitutional promises of dignity, equality and freedom materialised...

item.title: TSA staffing shortages cause long airport security lines amid partial government shutdown
item.description: TSA workers across the United States are facing financial strain as they continue to report to work without pay during the ongoing partial government shutdown, now in effect since mid-February. Airpor...

item.title: NACADA Raids Home in Kisii, Recovers Bhang as Key Drug Vendor Evades Arrest

item.title: US Swing Voters React to Trump's Iran Conflict Before Midterms
item.description: Donald Trump’s ongoing war with Iran is creating waves among independent US voters, who could decide if Republicans hold Congress in November midterms. In a Pennsylvania diner in swing state, retired ...

item.description: The Capital1 Solar Spikers ended their Premier Volleyball League (PVL) All-Filipino Conference preliminary round on a winning note after surviving a tough challenge from the Galeries Tower Highrisers....

item.title: Security expert warns of China’s expanding influence efforts in the Philippines
item.description: A security expert has raised alarms over what he described as extensive and coordinated influence operations being carried out by China in the Philippines. According to his analysis, these efforts go ...

item.title: New Fast-Moving Land-Dwelling Crocodile Relative Discovered in Triassic Britain
item.description: Paleontologists have discovered a new species of early crocodile relative from the Late Triassic period, approximately 215 million years ago, in Gloucester, UK. Unlike modern crocodiles, this species,...

item.title: Muslims in Delhi's Uttam Nagar Thank Police by Showering Flowers After Peaceful Eid-ul-Fitr Prayers Amid Earlier Tensions
item.description: In Delhi's Uttam Nagar area, which had been experiencing communal tension following a fatal clash during Holi earlier in March 2026, the Eid-ul-Fitr celebrations passed off peacefully on Saturday. A 2...

item.title: Assessing the Current Instability and Potential Leadership Change in Iran

item.description: South Korea has formally joined a group of seven countries, including the United Kingdom, France, Germany, Italy, Japan, the Netherlands and Canada, in a joint statement condemning Iran’s attacks in t...

item.title: Australian Officials Deny Navy Involvement in US Submarine Attack on Iranian Warship
item.description: Questions have arisen about the involvement of Australian Navy personnel aboard a US submarine that sank an Iranian warship on March 4, 2026, killing at least 87 Iranians. Defence officials, including...

item.title: U.S. Temporarily Relaxes Sanctions on Iranian Oil Aboard Ships to Ease Global Price Pressures
item.description: The U.S. Treasury Department has issued a narrow, time‑limited authorization allowing the sale of Iranian crude oil and petroleum products already loaded onto ships as of March 20, 2026. The general l...

item.title: Trump's Economic Chaos and Rising US Debt Amid Iran War
item.description: The US national debt has skyrocketed to over $39 trillion, with its growth set to accelerate as the war on Iran intensifies under Donald Trump’s administration. The US Defense Department is now reques...

item.title: World Happiness Report 2026 Links Heavy Social Media Use to Lower Life Satisfaction Among Young People

item.title: NIMASA DG Advocates Digital Transformation to Boost Women’s Role in Maritime Industry
